source_intake_record.raw_question_text: P is held aligned at origin as shown and Q is displaced along x-axis by x and both P and Q are released. The floor on which they are kept is smooth. P reaches maximum speed of 2 m/s when it is 0.2/3 m from origin during the subsequent SHM of the two bodies. Then, what is the value of x?

the physical configuration of P and Q and their alignment/displacement likely depends on the diagram
multi_step: the problem asks for x from SHM information involving maximum speed and position from origin, which suggests combining multiple relations rather than direct lookup
the setup involves two bodies and subsequent SHM, implying model interpretation plus calculation
multiple-choice options are provided, consistent with a computed physics result
verifiability: answer_text is a specific numeric quantity ('0.1 m')
answer_type is short_text, which is easy to compare after normalization
choices are provided and one option exactly matches the answer_text
